texts.label: text
texts.orig: Nestled on one of Africa's and Kenya's most stunning beaches, adjacent to Diani Beachvoted Africa's Leading Beach Destination at the World Travel Awards 2024 and the Top Beach in Kenya by TripAdvisor in 2023 -Lantana Galu Beach is the ultimate beach escape .
texts.text: Nestled on one of Africa's and Kenya's most stunning beaches, adjacent to Diani Beachvoted Africa's Leading Beach Destination at the World Travel Awards 2024 and the Top Beach in Kenya by TripAdvisor in 2023 -Lantana Galu Beach is the ultimate beach escape .

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Set within expansive tropical gardens, our resort features a range of spacious, elegantly designed and Swahili inspired beachfront Suites & Villas , catering to families, couples and groups alike, offering a perfect blend of comfort and luxury.
texts.text: Set within expansive tropical gardens, our resort features a range of spacious, elegantly designed and Swahili inspired beachfront Suites & Villas , catering to families, couples and groups alike, offering a perfect blend of comfort and luxury.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lantana Galu Beach upholds international 5-star standards, having earned numerous TripAdvisor Travellers' Choice Awards , the latest being in 2025 together with other accolades over the years including LuxLife -Most Tranquil Resort, Diani Beach 2023 and the World Luxury Hotel Awards -East Africa Regional Winner 2019: Luxury Family Beach Resort.
texts.text: Lantana Galu Beach upholds international 5-star standards, having earned numerous TripAdvisor Travellers' Choice Awards , the latest being in 2025 together with other accolades over the years including LuxLife -Most Tranquil Resort, Diani Beach 2023 and the World Luxury Hotel Awards -East Africa Regional Winner 2019: Luxury Family Beach Resort.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our guests are consistently impressed by our exceptional, personalised service . At Lantana Galu Beach, we pride ourselves on providing a level of hospitality that ensures every stay is unforgettable.
texts.text: Our guests are consistently impressed by our exceptional, personalised service . At Lantana Galu Beach, we pride ourselves on providing a level of hospitality that ensures every stay is unforgettable.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Pristine white sandy beach, relaxing & quiet
texts.text: Pristine white sandy beach, relaxing & quiet

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  More space & privacy vs traditional hotel rooms
texts.text: More space & privacy vs traditional hotel rooms

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: ·  Direct links from Nairobi to Diani or to Mombasa: Safarilink, JamboJet, ALS, Madaraka Express Train
texts.text: Direct links from Nairobi to Diani or to Mombasa: Safarilink, JamboJet, ALS, Madaraka Express Train

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All the Suites & Villas at Lantana Galu Beach include a dining area to seat 6 or 8 people, lounge with satellite TV, ceiling fans, air-conditioning and mosquito nets in the bedrooms, dining and lounge terrace, fully equipped kitchen with kettle, cooker, fridge/freezer, microwave, cutlery, crockery and glassware, laundry room with iron, washing machine and drying area.
texts.text: All the Suites & Villas at Lantana Galu Beach include a dining area to seat 6 or 8 people, lounge with satellite TV, ceiling fans, air-conditioning and mosquito nets in the bedrooms, dining and lounge terrace, fully equipped kitchen with kettle, cooker, fridge/freezer, microwave, cutlery, crockery and glassware, laundry room with iron, washing machine and drying area.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: 1 king ensuite with corner sofa lounge & walk-in wardrobe
texts.text: 1 king ensuite with corner sofa lounge & walk-in wardrobe

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bathroom with bathtub & shower, lounge terrace with bar, sun loungers and outdoor Jacuzzi.
texts.text: Bathroom with bathtub & shower, lounge terrace with bar, sun loungers and outdoor Jacuzzi.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For up to 4 people | 172m² 1 king ensuite | 1 twin with adjacent bathroom
texts.text: For up to 4 people | 172m² 1 king ensuite | 1 twin with adjacent bathroom

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Bungalows suites include their own private front garden with a private plunge pool.
texts.text: Bungalows suites include their own private front garden with a private plunge pool.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Ground floor interior courtyard with triple height space featuring a fountain and free-standing staircase, bedrooms on the first floor and second floor roof top terrace with mini- fridge, bar, Barraza and sun loungers. The Beach Villa includes its own private plunge pool and outdoor patio.
texts.text: Ground floor interior courtyard with triple height space featuring a fountain and free-standing staircase, bedrooms on the first floor and second floor roof top terrace with mini- fridge, bar, Barraza and sun loungers. The Beach Villa includes its own private plunge pool and outdoor patio.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our rates include accommodation and meals (where indicated), housekeeping once a day, evening turn-down service, satellite TV, Wi-Fi and all government taxes and levies.
texts.text: Our rates include accommodation and meals (where indicated), housekeeping once a day, evening turn-down service, satellite TV, Wi-Fi and all government taxes and levies.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: A deposit of 50% is required to confirm a booking, full payment is due 30 days prior to arrival. Deposits are non-refundable. Cancellations made 35-25 days before arrival incur a 75% cancellation fee. Cancellations made less than 25 days before arrival incur a 100% cancellation fee.
texts.text: A deposit of 50% is required to confirm a booking, full payment is due 30 days prior to arrival. Deposits are non-refundable. Cancellations made 35-25 days before arrival incur a 75% cancellation fee. Cancellations made less than 25 days before arrival incur a 100% cancellation fee.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Le Café at Lantana Galu Beach -Beachside Restaurant & Bar
texts.text: Le Café at Lantana Galu Beach -Beachside Restaurant & Bar

texts.label: text
texts.orig: With stunning views of the beach and pool, the restaurant offers a relaxed yet unforgettable dining experience. Choose from the ocean breeze by the beach, poolside, or our vibrant garden. Our à la carte and Room Service menus feature freshly brewed coffee, creamy ice creams, wines, and Procera gin cocktails. Enjoy our standout dishes: ⬧ Fresh Catch of the Day ⬧ Swahili Coconut Prawn Curry ⬧ Grilled Specialties & Wood-Fired Pizzas ⬧ Healthy Kids' Menu ⬧ Tempting Desserts!
texts.text: With stunning views of the beach and pool, the restaurant offers a relaxed yet unforgettable dining experience. Choose from the ocean breeze by the beach, poolside, or our vibrant garden. Our à la carte and Room Service menus feature freshly brewed coffee, creamy ice creams, wines, and Procera gin cocktails. Enjoy our standout dishes: ⬧ Fresh Catch of the Day ⬧ Swahili Coconut Prawn Curry ⬧ Grilled Specialties & Wood-Fired Pizzas ⬧ Healthy Kids' Menu ⬧ Tempting Desserts!

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Reception runs on a 24-hour basis. Our Receptionists can advise on and book excursions, restaurants, water sport activities and taxis on behalf of guests. They are also a guest's first point of contact for any additional requirements or requests during their stay at Lantana Galu Beach.
texts.text: The Reception runs on a 24-hour basis. Our Receptionists can advise on and book excursions, restaurants, water sport activities and taxis on behalf of guests. They are also a guest's first point of contact for any additional requirements or requests during their stay at Lantana Galu Beach.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The gym, comprising a large airy room with mirrors is fully equipped with the latest fitness machines. The gym is open all day for residents to use freely. Adjacent to the gym is the 5enses massage & beauty studio offering relaxing massages, treatments and therapies.
texts.text: The gym, comprising a large airy room with mirrors is fully equipped with the latest fitness machines. The gym is open all day for residents to use freely. Adjacent to the gym is the 5enses massage & beauty studio offering relaxing massages, treatments and therapies.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In addition to offering convenience sundry items, the shop also stocks a variety of trendy costal wear, accessories and artwork by local artists.
texts.text: In addition to offering convenience sundry items, the shop also stocks a variety of trendy costal wear, accessories and artwork by local artists.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Amenities & Facilities at Lantana Galu Beach
texts.text: Amenities & Facilities at Lantana Galu Beach

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For printing, scanning and photocopying services in addition to access to a computer.
texts.text: For printing, scanning and photocopying services in addition to access to a computer.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: There are two leisure pools each with a paddling pool for children: the beachside swimming pool and the garden swimming pool with sun beds and fresh pool towels provided every day.
texts.text: There are two leisure pools each with a paddling pool for children: the beachside swimming pool and the garden swimming pool with sun beds and fresh pool towels provided every day.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lantana Galu Beach is in close proximity to Diani's water sport centres offering: kite surfing, diving, snorkelling, wind surfing, deep sea fishing, dolphin safaris, jet skiing. Activities can be booked via the Reception.
texts.text: Lantana Galu Beach is in close proximity to Diani's water sport centres offering: kite surfing, diving, snorkelling, wind surfing, deep sea fishing, dolphin safaris, jet skiing. Activities can be booked via the Reception.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: These can be provided for children at no extra cost upon request and subject to availability.
texts.text: These can be provided for children at no extra cost upon request and subject to availability.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our Honeymoon Package includes a 30-minute spa treatment for 2, a seafood dinner for 2 at Le Café , our beachside restaurant, with a bottle of sparkling wine and flowers in the unit. Minimum 3-night stay or 7 nights over Peak Season. Proof of marriage required.
texts.text: Our Honeymoon Package includes a 30-minute spa treatment for 2, a seafood dinner for 2 at Le Café , our beachside restaurant, with a bottle of sparkling wine and flowers in the unit. Minimum 3-night stay or 7 nights over Peak Season. Proof of marriage required.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: For up to 300 guests, we offer bespoke weddings and party packages with tailor-made menus and setup backed by our team of experienced and dedicated staff renowned for their exemplary service.
texts.text: For up to 300 guests, we offer bespoke weddings and party packages with tailor-made menus and setup backed by our team of experienced and dedicated staff renowned for their exemplary service.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Lantana Galu Beach has pledged to support the UN Environment's efforts to create a plastic free coastline . As such we no longer provide plastic straws, water is served in glass bottles and our in-unit soaps, shampoos and conditioner are provided in metal, refillable bottles.
texts.text: Lantana Galu Beach has pledged to support the UN Environment's efforts to create a plastic free coastline . As such we no longer provide plastic straws, water is served in glass bottles and our in-unit soaps, shampoos and conditioner are provided in metal, refillable bottles.
